headline: This build pushes Ryokoplan further away from an early prototype feel by tightening the visual system itself—more mature control sizing, calmer shadows and radii, cleaner search and filter bars, stronger card hierarchy, and more believable mobile and desktop proportions across the core surfaces.
notes: Refines the core visual system so buttons, chips, tabs, search rows, sticky tools, and support surfaces feel more like one finished product rather than assembled prototypes.
Tightens card proportions, shadows, borders, body padding, image framing, and section rhythm so Home, Magazine, My Trips, and result surfaces read as cleaner editorial product UI.

Improves practical feel on both mobile and desktop with calmer top-bar chrome, better dock and sticky-bar sizing, more realistic first-fold spacing, and more restrained launch/support surface presence.
